title: Boxed Crème Caramel
excerpt: Ingredients 125 ml white sugar 20 ml water 1 x 415 g box of shop-bought custard extra sugar (optional) 10 g gelatine 5 ml vanilla essence Method Put the sugar in a small saucepan together with the water. Stir and then leave to slowly heat up into a deep golden caramel syrup. Spray 4 – …
html:
Ingredients

  • 125 ml white sugar
  • 20 ml water
  • 1 x 415 g box of shop-bought custard
  • extra sugar (optional)
  • 10 g gelatine
  • 5 ml vanilla essence

Method

Put the sugar in a small saucepan together with the water.

Stir and then leave to slowly heat up into a deep golden caramel syrup.

Spray 4 – 6 small ramekins with non-stick spray and place the ramekins on a baking tray or tray.

Carefully pour the caramel syrup into the ramekins – make sure you divide the syrup fairly evenly between the ramekins.

Dissolve the gelatine in the microwave and mix thoroughly with the custard.

If the custard isn't sweet enough for your taste, add extra sugar to taste.

Stir the vanilla essence into the custard and carefully pour the mixture over the caramel syrup in the ramekins.

Place the baking tray or tray in the fridge for a few hours until the puddings have set.

Then carefully turn out onto serving plates, garnish however you like and serve.

Makes 4 – 6 servings.

Easy!
